introduction: A clinical situation in which the testis is absent from the scrotum. May be bilateral or unilateral

features: Absence of one or both testes from the scrotum
Pain from trauma to the testis
Inguinal hernia may be present on the affected side

drug: Hormone therapy: Human chorionic gonadotropin 1,500 units/week intramuscularly, for a total of 9 injections - Applicable only to special cases

definitive_treatment: Surgical treatment: In those with undescended testes bring testis down and fix it in the scrotum
